seoTitle: Export Customer Email Addresses in QuickBooks
metaDescription: Learn how to export your customers' email addresses from QuickBooks so you can build marketing lists and streamline outreach.
intro: Having a clean export of your customers' email addresses makes it easier to run marketing campaigns and stay organized. This guide walks through accessing the customer list in QuickBooks and exporting the email data you need.

steps.heading: Access your customer list
steps.body: Navigate to the customer section of QuickBooks where all client records, including contact details, are stored.

steps.heading: Export email addresses
steps.body: Use the export function to download customer data, including email addresses, into a file you can use elsewhere.

steps.heading: Use the exported data
steps.body: Import the exported list into your email marketing tool or CRM to begin organizing outreach campaigns.

steps.heading: Maintain data accuracy
steps.body: Periodically re-export and update your list to keep it in sync with any new or changed customer information in QuickBooks.

faq.question: What file format does the export use?
faq.answer: Exports typically come in a spreadsheet-friendly format like CSV, making it easy to open or import into other tools.

faq.question: Can I export only certain customers?
faq.answer: Yes, you can often filter your customer list before exporting to include only the specific customers you need.

faq.question: Is it possible to integrate QuickBooks directly with email marketing tools?
faq.answer: Many QuickBooks integrations exist with email marketing platforms, allowing more automated syncing beyond manual exports.

faq.question: Do I need special permissions to export customer data?
faq.answer: Depending on your role and account setup, exporting customer data may require admin-level access.
